controls.title: Customer Data Protection
controls.description: Financial institutions must implement technical and organisational measures to protect customer PII including BVN, account numbers, and transaction history.

controls.title: KYC and Identity Verification
controls.description: KYC procedures must verify customer identity using government-issued IDs (NIN, BVN, passport) before account opening or high-value transactions.

controls.title: Incident and Breach Reporting
controls.description: Cyber incidents must be reported to the CBN within 24 hours of detection. Institutions must maintain a cyber incident register.
